title: bromopsis pumpelliana subsp. vogulica
intro: Bromopsis pumpelliana subsp. vogulica, also known as a subspecies of the mountain bent grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromopsis pumpelliana subsp. vogulica include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
